message:
test(unit): expand sharded_counter.rs inline tests from 27 to 35 (+8) (ft-2xa6f)

Add tests for AtomicU64-compatible shims (load, fetch_add, store/load),
gauge default, max shard_count accessor, debug format, observe duplicate
value, empty snapshot serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
